response.justification: The candidate's resume lacks critical domain expertise in C++ development for capital markets or fixed income systems, with no mention of Windows platform experience, SQL Server/Oracle proficiency, or financial-sector background. While they have extensive software development experience (15+ years), their roles primarily involve web/mobile/embedded systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source GIS platforms, which do not align with the core requirements for a C++ Developer in capital markets.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms (15+ years)
Strong problem-solving and software craftsmanship skills (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Demonstrated ability to deliver high-performance systems (low-latency apps, real-time data handling)
concerns: No direct experience with C++ development on Windows platforms (mandatory requirement)
No domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income systems
Lacks required SQL Server/Oracle and financial-sector experience
